meaning: n.飞行云,轨迹n.[航空]凝结尾(飞机在晴冷而潮湿的空气中飞行时在尾部所形成的一条类似云带物)
examples: After a thorough investigation, many experts now believe that the streak was a run-of-the-mill jet aircraft contrail.
Contrail requires users to opt-in if they want to receive information from friends.
A contrail is the visible vapor trail behind airplanes or rockets traveling at high altitudes.
